text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
choice_data_list: Now you've got something to protect.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That's right. You can count on me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I already have a stuffed bear in my room
that my grandparents gave me, so I'm quite
accustomed to caring for plushies.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There's plenty of room, so I'll guard each of them
with all my might.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it's nice to have more friends.
